experiences.title: Fractional Head of Digital & Programmatic Strategy
experiences.description: I’m a Freelance Digital Media & Programmatic Strategy Consultant with 18+ years of experience leading high-performance media strategies across global markets, with a deep focus on the MENA region. Previously Head of Programmatic at Publicis Groupe MENA and Head of Sales at Sizmek MENA, I’ve worked with over 200 brands including NEOM, McDonald's, Samsung, LVMH, Dubai Tourism, and more. My background spans major holding groups, ad tech platforms, and client-direct partnerships, giving me a unique perspective on media strategy from both the buy-side and technology side. I partner with companies of all sizes, from startups and independent agencies to international brands and holding groups, offering flexible senior-level expertise without the commitment of a full-time hire. Key Capabilities: • Independent audits of programmatic strategy, execution, and media planning • Supply Path Optimisation (SPO) and premium marketplace curation • Audience-first activation strategies across DOOH, CTV, Mobile, Gaming, Display, and Audio • Partner selection, in-housing design, and platform setup (DV360, The Trade Desk, Amazon DSP, Adform) • Cross-channel media planning and channel mix modeling • Strategic leadership for luxury, hospitality, government, and retail sectors • Bespoke team mentoring, training, and capability-building programs Whether you need support on a single project, a campaign overhaul, pitch preparation, or short-term strategic leadership, I bring the technical depth, commercial insight, and regional expertise to deliver fast, measurable results. Let’s connect if you’re looking for freelance media strategy support, expert advisory, or a fractional media lead.

experiences.title: Co-Founder
experiences.description: At AURA8 we help brands own the real world, placing them into physical spaces where life happens,  from premium and luxury hotels, to beach clubs and cultural venues, to airports and attractions, and beyond. Our approach isn’t just about buying space; it’s about curating relevance. We match the right brand to the right place, every time, ensuring visibility isn’t just an impression, it’s a moment that matters.

experiences.title: Regional Commercial Director
experiences.description: Ex-Publicis | Ex-Sizmek As Regional Commercial Director MENA for Yazle Global I am responsible for driving revenue growth, expanding market presence, and overseeing the commercial strategy across the region. In this role I combine leadership, strategic planning, sales, and client relationship management to achieve business, sales team and individual contributor goals.

experiences.title: Head of Programmatic MENA
experiences.description: As the leader of the programmatic trading business for Publicis Group across the MENA region, I oversaw the strategic media delivery for top agency brands including Starcom, Spark Foundry, Zenith, Digitas, and Leo Burnett. My role involved managing a diverse portfolio of over 200 clients, such as NEOM, McDonald's, Samsung, and BMW, with responsibility for programmatic marketing budgets totalling between $80M to $100M USD annually. I provided leadership and mentorship to a team of 42 media specialists, guiding their professional development and overseeing the expansion of hub teams in Lebanon, Turkey, and Dubai. My expertise in building and maintaining strong partnerships with key media and technology partners like Amazon, Google, and a long list of local and international technology and publisher solutions ensured favourable media buying rates and the successful execution of programmatic campaigns. In this role, I also developed and implement omni-channel planning strategies that integrate offline, TV, and digital channels, working closely with data science, content, commerce media, and social delivery teams to create comprehensive media solutions. I was responsible for audience planning across various channels, including Digital Out Of Home, Programmatic Display and Video, Digital Audio, Connected TV, Social platforms, Commerce, and Retail Media, while ensuring adherence to brand safety guidelines and industry standards. Additionally, I collaborated with agency C-level executives and client stakeholders to align media strategies with brand business objectives, ensuring that all proposed solutions were of the highest quality and effectively met client needs.

experiences.title: Fractional Head of Digital & Programmatic Strategy
experiences.description:
I’m a Freelance Digital Media & Programmatic Strategy Consultant with 18+ years of experience leading high-performance media strategies across global markets, with a deep focus on the MENA region.

Previously Head of Programmatic at Publicis Groupe MENA and Head of Sales at Sizmek MENA, I’ve worked with over 200 brands including NEOM, McDonald's, Samsung, LVMH, Dubai Tourism, and more. My background spans major holding groups, ad tech platforms, and client-direct partnerships, giving me a unique perspective on media strategy from both the buy-side and technology side.

I partner with companies of all sizes, from startups and independent agencies to international brands and holding groups, offering flexible senior-level expertise without the commitment of a full-time hire.

Key Capabilities:
• Independent audits of programmatic strategy, execution, and media planning
• Supply Path Optimisation (SPO) and premium marketplace curation
• Audience-first activation strategies across DOOH, CTV, Mobile, Gaming, Display, and Audio
• Partner selection, in-housing design, and platform setup (DV360, The Trade Desk, Amazon DSP, Adform)
• Cross-channel media planning and channel mix modeling
• Strategic leadership for luxury, hospitality, government, and retail sectors
• Bespoke team mentoring, training, and capability-building programs

Whether you need support on a single project, a campaign overhaul, pitch preparation, or short-term strategic leadership, I bring the technical depth, commercial insight, and regional expertise to deliver fast, measurable results.

Let’s connect if you’re looking for freelance media strategy support, expert advisory, or a fractional media lead.

recommendations:
Andy McNab

I had the good fortune to work with Dylan as firstly a client, then a colleague. In both cases I found Dylan to be pro active, professional and good fun to be around. He gets digital and would be a good asset for any business.

Mark Davies

I found working with Dylan a both enlightening and enjoyable experience.  He has exemplary client service skills and an outstanding and broad knowledge of the digital spectrum. I recommend him without hesitation.
